obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate standard email format with TLD required.
obligations.why: Baseline behavior must validate standard email addresses and reject invalid ones.
This option explicitly permits display name syntax.

obligations.rule: Option `require_display_name: true` rejects emails without display names.
obligations.why: This option enforces display name syntax.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_utf8_local_part: false` disallows non-English UTF-8 characters in the local part.
obligations.why: This option restricts the local part to ASCII characters.

obligations.rule: Option `require_tld: false` allows domains without TLD.
obligations.why: This option relaxes the requirement for a TLD.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_ip_domain: true` allows IP addresses in the domain part.
obligations.why: This option explicitly permits IP-based domains.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_underscores: true` allows underscores in the local part.
obligations.why: This option explicitly permits underscores in the local part.

obligations.rule: Option `domain_specific_validation: true` applies stricter rules for certain domains.
obligations.why: This option enforces domain-specific validation rules.

obligations.rule: Option `blacklisted_chars` rejects emails containing specific characters in the local part.
obligations.why: This option enforces a blacklist of characters.

obligations.rule: Option `host_blacklist` rejects emails with blacklisted domains.
obligations.why: This option enforces a blacklist of domains.

obligations.rule: Option `host_whitelist` rejects emails not in the whitelist of domains.
obligations.why: This option enforces a whitelist of domains.

obligations.rule: Option `ignore_max_length: true` allows emails exceeding the standard max length.
obligations.why: This option explicitly permits longer email addresses.

test_groups.title: Default behavior: standard email validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers baseline email validation rules with no options.

test_groups.title: Allow display name format
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_display_name` option allowing 'Display Name <email>' syntax.

test_groups.title: Require display name format
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_display_name` option enforcing display name syntax.

test_groups.title: Disallow UTF-8 in local part
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_utf8_local_part` option restricting local part to ASCII.

test_groups.title: Allow domains without TLD
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_tld` option allowing domains without TLD.

test_groups.title: Allow IP addresses in domain
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_ip_domain` option permitting IP-based domains.

test_groups.title: Allow underscores in local part
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_underscores` option permitting underscores in the local part.

test_groups.title: Domain-specific validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `domain_specific_validation` option enforcing stricter domain rules.

test_groups.title: Blacklist specific characters in local part
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `blacklisted_chars` option rejecting specific characters in the local part.

test_groups.title: Blacklist specific domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `host_blacklist` option rejecting emails with blacklisted domains.

test_groups.title: Whitelist specific domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `host_whitelist` option rejecting emails not in the whitelist.

test_groups.title: Ignore max length restriction
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `ignore_max_length` option allowing longer email addresses.
